title: hypochaeris radicata subsp. neapolitana
intro: Hypochaeris radicata subsp. neapolitana is a subspecies of plant in the dandelion family, known for its edible leaves and roots. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hypochaeris radicata subsp. neapolitana include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparation of this plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
